episodes.title: Trying To Prove Your Best Friend Is In A CULT! | Big Mood | Channel 4 Comedy
episodes.description:
Taken from Series 2, Episode 5 of Big Mood, Maggie (Nicola Coughlan) cooks up a plan to get Eddie (Lydia West) away from Whitney (Hannah Onslow) once and for all. And, from Episode 6 of the same series, Maggie is blindsided by a shocking revelation after taking Eddie on a trip down memory lane.

Also starring Amalia Vitale, Luke Fetherston, Robert Gilbert, Eamon Farren and Niamh Cusack. 

00:00 Episode 5 - Operation Bring Back Eddie 
01:59 Anya’s waters break!
04:29 Whitney (AKA Catherine) is exposed
05:54 More lies are uncovered
06:07 Episode 6 - How Maggie and Eddie met
06:49 What they both think about their friendship
07:44 The Hackney Online Bar of the Year Award
09:19 What really happened last year?

#BigMood #NicolaCoughlan #Comedy #Finale

SUBSCRIBE: https://www.youtube.com/c/Channel4Comedy?sub_confirmation=1

episodes.title: Is This The Most Terrifying Cult Yet? | Mitchell and Webb Are Not Helping | Channel 4 Comedy
episodes.description:
I'll never look at those little chocolates they leave on your pillow the same again. 

New sketches. Familiar faces. Helpfulness not guaranteed. Brand-new comedy from David Mitchell & Robert Webb. Watch more here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGmQ1G5rNbwQ3dhyE3zfdHE9u5tZJnrAe
